text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a few days after the Arima Kinen, and Daiwa
Scarlet is furious.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What were you thinking, delaying your return
without consulting anyone and ignoring my
messages?! You're unbelievable!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
My bad. I didn't have time to respond to your
texts. I was in the middle of training.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Training? For what?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I have to toughen myself up, mentally and
physically!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'm still not good enough. I need to be better!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...Why do you sound so pressed? Tell me what's
going on and I'll forgive your behavior.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I considered you my rival. I thought I'd never lose
to you, that I was better than you...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: But in the end, I didn't win a single G1!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I didn't think I would care. 'Cause this is just the
start for me! But the day before I was supposed to
fly back, I had a dream.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Daiwa Scarlet finishes in first! And her rival, Vodka... fifth place! What a gap in talent between the two!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You just kept thrashing me, over and over! Even
my subconscious was telling me there was no way
I could beat you!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: My will's too weak! I can't even dream of beating you! There's no way I can go home now, not like this! Sob!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...She hung up on me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What's with her? Getting all depressed like that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The moment she finishes speaking. Daiwa Scarlet
sets about searching videos online.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oka Sho, the Japanese Derby, the autumn Tenno
Sho...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She copies the links to every race in which she's
run against Vodka, then sends them to her.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Why'd you call me back?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Shut up! Just watch the videos I sent you!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
What? What did you send me these for? I lost in
all of them...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Stop asking questions and watch! I'll burn your
precious motorcycle posters if you don't!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Y-you wouldn't dare! Ugh, fine, I'll watch them!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They're off the fourth corner and into the last
stretch! Who will be the first to break away?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The commentary coming from Daiwa Scarlet's
phone takes me back to that race. She was
running with Vodka on her mind.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...You were paying way too much attention to me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...If I didn't, you would've caught me. I can't not pay attention to you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's not just during races, either. I think about you
during training, when I'm practicing alone... Even
now!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I hate to admit it, but if it wasn't for you, my run
in the Twinkle Series wouldn't have meant much.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I never would've had to think about what it really
means to be number one. I would've been content
to just win and move on!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: So don't you dare go losing all your self-confidence just because of a few measly losses! Idiot!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Instead of wasting your time moping and being
miserable, you should be challenging me to a
partner run or something!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Scarlet...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. You're right. I can't let a few losses get me
down.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All right! That's enough training! I'm gonna head
back tomorrow! And once I'm home, it's race time!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'll beat you for sure, so you'd better prepare
yourself!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Heh! Come at me with all you've got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's clear to me from their conversation that
Daiwa Scarlet's bond with Vodka transcends that
of mere rivals.
